title: chargeback — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two class-level attributes for listener discovery. `AsChargebackListener` subscribes to chargeback lifecycle events (filed / evidence_requested / evidence_submitted / under_review / won / lost / expired / accepted_refund / evidence_overdue / rate_threshold_exceeded / webhook_received / reconciled). `AsChargebackEvidenceListener` subscribes to chargeback_evidence events (submitted). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events. No property-level attributes: the two owned rows use ordinary Eloquent + spatie/laravel-data class attributes shipped by foundation.

attributes.name: AsChargebackListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to chargeback lifecycle events (ChargebackFiled / ChargebackEvidenceRequested / ChargebackEvidenceSubmitted / ChargebackUnderReview / ChargebackWon / ChargebackLost / ChargebackExpired / ChargebackAcceptedRefund / ChargebackEvidenceOverdue / ChargebackClawbackReferral / ChargebackClawbackCoupon / ChargebackNetworkFeeRecorded / ChargebackTransactionRecorded / ChargebackWebhookReceived / ChargebackReconciled / ChargebackRateThresholdExceeded).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every Chargeback* event.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (chargebacks or chargebacks-critical).

attributes.name: AsChargebackEvidenceListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to chargeback_evidence lifecycle events (ChargebackEvidenceSubmitted). Evidence rows are immutable at creation — no update / delete events fire.
